texto: The love, support, and respect the members of the theater community have for one another is unparalleled. Say what you want about us wacky drama-types, but one thing that makes our business special is our loyalty, our fierce commitment to one another, and our mutual respect.
explicacao: Citação de Monica Raymund sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “The love, support, and respect the members of the theater community have for one another is unpar…” articula negocios, love, business em registro de negocios, com relevância para contextos como business e community.
